properties.displayName: Storage account should restrict source and destination targets for specified storage account object replication policies.
properties.description: This policy applies exclusively to Mission Platform products and services; usage outside of these scopes is not supported. Restrict Source and Destination Targets for Specified Storage Account Object Replication Policies. storageAccountTargets is an array of objects with Storage Account Name, Source Storage Account Names, and Destination Storage Account Names.

metadata.displayName: Storage account should restrict source and destination targets for specified storage account object replication policies. effect
metadata.description: Enforce Storage account should restrict source and destination targets for specified storage account object replication policies. effect

An array of objects specifying governed storage accounts and their approved object replication source/destination pairs. Each element has the shape: { "saName": "<governed storage account name>", "sourceSAs": ["<approved source storage account name>", ...], "destSAs": ["<approved destination storage account name>", ...] }. Example: [{ "saName": "governedSA1", "sourceSAs": ["srcSA-a"], "destSAs": ["dstSA-x"] }].
